violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, potato slicer blade, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment was moved to the dish area for proper cleaning at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Cheeses stored in the ice baths at the cookline area were observed to be held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Cheeses were observed to be "double panned" and not in contact with the ice slurry below. Based on the time items were stocked from refrigeration, food items were moved back to refrigeration to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Working spray containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles are to be marked with the name of the chemical stored inside. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The 4th floor hand sink was observed to have the soda gun drain tube draining into it. PIC is to move the soda gun tubing or designate the current hand sink as the dump sink for the soda gun tubing to drain into, and then label the dump sink as the designated hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Plastic ramakins in the 1st floor kitchen were observed stored with the food contact surface up. Ramakins are to be stored so that only bases are touched by employees when used. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Plastic ramakins in the 1st floor kitchen were observed stored with the food contact surface up. Ramakins are to be stored so that only bases are touched by employees when used. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The light shield(s) to the ceiling mounted lights in the 1st floor dish area were observed to be cracked/chipped and taped. Light shield(s) are to be replaced, or lights switched to plastic led bulbs. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
